description: Minimal deterministic output fixtures for app-audit output contracts. These are file-backed recorded fixtures, not provider-backed model evidence or semantic quality proof.

cases.input: mode:headless run with no staged raw issues and no --raw-issues file.
cases.input_summary: mode:headless run with no staged raw issues and no --raw-issues file.
cases.expected_outcome: Runner records issue_synthesis_status:not_run, keeps issues empty, and renders Awaiting LLM audit instead of inventing issues.

headless_envelope_contains: Awaiting LLM audit: no semantic issues produced; runner did not invent issues.

cases.input: mode:headless receives figma-ref without local figma-context JSON.
cases.input_summary: mode:headless run receives figma-ref without local figma-context JSON.
cases.expected_outcome: Runner preserves input_figma_reference_only as degraded coverage and keeps design findings skipped or advisory.

recorded_output.finding_posture: design alignment findings remain skipped or advisory without local materialized context

cases.input: from:code-review issue artifact with project-specific evidence is normalized for downstream review.
cases.input_summary: from:code-review issue artifact with project-specific evidence is normalized for downstream review.
cases.expected_outcome: Issue normalization preserves enabled code_review_handoff fields with severity, owner, verification, run id, and source issue id.
